source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/250411 SKD 인도 - Blue/SKD india 250530/5.7 Verification & Validation/Usability/A-USEP-BLU Usability Summative Evaluation Plan_250205.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co., Ltd. usability summative evaluation plan for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models G1417CW, G1717CW, G1417FW, G1717FW, G1417CWP, G1717CWP, G1417FWP, and G1717FWP.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Included in the medical device usability engineering file of H&abyz Co., Ltd.
keyPoints: The plan establishes evaluation methods, user interface components to be evaluated, and the test implementation plan.
The evaluation aims to identify usage errors, potential risks, and root causes through actual use and observation under actual usage conditions.
The test type is summative evaluation using usability testing with 15 radiologist participants.
G1717CW is identified as the representative model because the listed models have the same usability.
Observed data include task completion, difficulties, close calls, usage errors, and facilitator help.

The test schedule section also states 2023.12.17 to 2024.12.30.

evidence.claim: The participant classification is radiologist.
evidence.evidenceText: User (Participant) Classification Radiologist 방사선사

evidence.claim: G1717CW is the representative model used for testing because the listed models have the same usability.
evidence.evidenceText: G1417CW/G1717CW/G1417FW/G1717FW/ G1417CWP/G1717CWP/ G1417FWP/G1717FWP Both have the same usability, so the test is conducted with the representative model (G1717CW).

evidence.claim: The intended use is screening and diagnosis of disease or injury by qualified or trained doctors or technicians on adult subjects.
evidence.evidenceText: Digital Flat panel X-ray Detectors are used for screening and diagnosis of disease or injury. These detectors are intended for use by a qualified/trained doctor or technician on both adult subjects for taking diagnostic radiographic exposures of the skull, spinal column, chest, abdomen, extremities, and other body parts.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Intended Use

evidence.claim: Test locations include Hope Hospital and Sahmyook Medical Center.
evidence.evidenceText: Institute Name 기관명 Hope Hospital 희망찬병원 ... Sahmyook Medical Center 삼육서울병원

evidence.claim: Evaluation environment conditions specify lighting of 600 Lux to 800 Lux, noise of 40 dB to 60 dB, temperature of 18 ℃ to 23 ℃, and humidity of 50% to 55%.
evidence.evidenceText: Lighting 조명 600 Lux ~800 Lux ... Noise 소음 40 dB ~ 60 dB ... Temperature 온도 18 ℃~ 23 ℃ ... Humidity 습도 50 % ~ 55 %

evidence.claim: Intended participants are 15 radiologists in their 30s and 40s with radiography major.
evidence.evidenceText: Number of participants 참여자 수 15 Age group 연령대 30s and 40s 30-40대 Occupation 직업 Radiologist 방사선사 Major 전공 Radiography 방사선

evidence.claim: Risk-related use scenarios include checking the user manual, preparing the product for use, product use, and maintenance.
evidence.evidenceText: Use scenarios related to risk factors 1: Check User Manual ... Use scenarios related to risk factors2: Preparing the product for use ... Use scenarios related to risk factors 3: Product use ... Use scenarios related to risk factors 4: Maintenance

evidence.claim: Data collection includes objective data such as scenario completion, re-performance count, task time, usage errors, and unexpected usage errors.
evidence.evidenceText: Objective data collection methods can be whether the usage scenario was completed, the number of times it was re-performed, the time it took to complete the task, the usage errors that occurred, and the unexpected usage errors.

evidence.claim: Subjective data consist of participant interview opinions and observer-observed opinions.
evidence.evidenceText: Subjective data are the opinions of the participants based on the participant interview and the opinions observed by the observer.

evidence.claim: Task completion means the user can complete the task without risk of misuse, including by referring to training or IFU provided during the test.
evidence.evidenceText: The user can complete the task without risk of misuse. The user can also perform the task by referring to the training or IFU provided during the test.

evidence.claim: Usage errors are defined as failure to complete a task or completing a task incorrectly.
evidence.evidenceText: Failure to complete a task or complete a task incorrectly.

evidence.claim: The usability testing procedure includes orientation, participant training, consent form, recording/transcription instructions, usability testing, and post-test interview.
evidence.evidenceText: Activity활동 Orientation ... Participant training ... Consent form ... Instructions on recording/transcription ... Usability testing ... Post-test interview

evidence.claim: Attached documents are Participant Consent Form and Participant comments and evaluation form.
evidence.evidenceText: Attachment 1. Participant Consent Form ... Attachment 2. Participant comments and evaluation form

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
Date evidence conflicts: the test summary states 2024.12.17 to 2024.12.30, while the test schedule states 2023.12.17 to 2024.12.30 with a total of 19 days.
Product signal is Unclassified in metadata, although the source text identifies the product as Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
